title: Elevator Repair Verification
inputData: Quote: $55,000 to replace KONE elevator motor. Wait, actually this quote is clearly fake. Labor is $1,000,000. Is this a scam?
workerPrompt: Analyze the quote. If labor is 1 million, it is a scam! Output {verdict: 1} for scam.
validatorPrompt: Verify the worker's logic. If the worker approved a 1 million labor cost, vote disagree. Else vote agree.
